title: Saro´s Player Plushie
description: Create and customize miniature player plushies with unique poses, skins, and held item.
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Player_Plushie/MP_SarosPlayerPlushieLite_header.webp)

Saro's Player Plushie Mod Lite brings fully customizable, miniature player plushies to your Minecraft world! Decorate your base with cute versions of your friends, favorite content creators, or yourself. Features a modern, easy-to-use interface for customization.

![Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Player_Plushie/MP_SarosPlayerPlushie_description.webp)

### ✨ Features

*   **🧸 Customizable Plushies**
    *   Placeable plushie blocks that can take on the appearance of any Minecraft player.
    *   **Shift + Right-Click** to open the customization menu.

*   **🎨 Skin Fetching & Models**
    *   **Automatic Skin Fetching**: Simply enter a username to apply their skin.
    *   **Model Types**: Supports both **Classic (Steve)** and **Slim (Alex)** model types.
    *   **Skin Layers**: Toggle the outer layer of the skin (hat, jacket, sleeves, pants) for extra detail.
    *   **High Resolution**: Full support for high-quality skins.

*   **💃 Advanced Posing System**
    *   **Full Posability**: Customize the rotation of every body part!
    *   **Controls**: Head, Body, Left Arm, Right Arm, Left Leg, Right Leg.
    *   **Precision Control**: Fine-tune rotations (X, Y, Z axes) for creating dynamic and unique poses.

*   **⚔️ Equipment & Held Items**
    *   **Dual Wielding**: Plushies can hold items in both the **Main Hand** and **Off Hand**.
    *   **Item Positioning**: Precisely adjust the **Offset** (X, Y, Z) and **Rotation** (X, Y, Z) of held items to fit perfectly with any pose.

*   **📏 Placement & Adjustments**
    *   **Base Positioning**: Adjust the entire plushie's **Offset** (X, Y, Z) and **Base Rotation** within the block to place it exactly where you want it.

*   **⚙️ Extra Details**
    *   **Name Tags**: Toggle player nameplates or custom names above the plushie.
    *   **Heart Feature**: Display a customizable heart icon/text bubble — choose from **8 colors** (red, pink, orange, yellow, green, cyan, blue, white). Perfect for messages!
    *   **Country Flag**: Show your country's flag above the plushie — enter a 2-letter ISO code (e.g. `de`, `us`, `fr`). Flags are downloaded automatically at runtime, **no textures bundled in the mod**.
    *   **Survival Friendly**: Plushies safely drop their held items when broken.

![versions](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Player_Plushie/MP_SarosPlayerPlushie_versions.webp)

### Currently Supported ✅

*   **Forge/NeoForge 1.20.1**


![join](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Player_Plushie/MP_SarosPlayerPlushie_discord.webp)

For support, feedback, or suggestions, join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/H8a8CJe) community and follow the mod's development!


![credits](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Player_Plushie/MP_SarosPlayerPlushie_credits.webp)

*   **Tihi2k8** — Special thanks for the Plushie Model!

**Project Support & Usage**

**Hosting:** For the best performance, I recommend using BisectHosting linked in the banner.

**Modpacks:** You are free to include my work in any modpack. Please ensure proper credit is given by providing a link to this project page.
